smiles for now but serious heads on for anybody who needed every single second the only time trialing of this Tour de France blue 22.4 kilometers and a stopwatch not lying I climb up the cut the Dom will see and all the way up to cornblue tough on this almost 650 meters of climbing with everything at stake started the day as the strongest Rider 24 seconds quicker than last person who had the hot seat briefly and the French Champion was daring to dream Stefan Kung was one of several Riders who went for a bike change for the final climb but it didn't work for the former European champion Julio chikone wasn't trying to win the stage he decided to go slowly on the way to the climb and then Blitz It Up The Climb as he wanted those King of the mountains points he was fastest and what fanart was starting to become the fastest on the road yomovisma having on 15 tour stages without a win taking one or would they for not going quicker going back to the bus but the GC Riders were still to come separated by only 10 seconds we'll gotcha starting two minutes ahead as he was in second place and then it was down to the yellow Jersey stuck to each other shadowing each other Head to Head elbow to Elbow but the time gaps were soon in favor of Jonas venger he started quicker much quicker than anybody else bogacha was also topping the time splits well vinegar or just get bettering them same story as they went to the second split pogacho ahead then going for a bike change off the DT bike onto the road bike could he make up the time around half a minute at this stage that vinegar had taken meanwhile at the Finish Bill Bowers riding well many fighting for their places in the top ten Jonas vinegar was on the day of his career one minute and five quicker Yates fighting for the podium and he'd move into third ahead of Carlos Rodriguez as pugacha was pulverizing the rest but a little look down the road saw the time gaps were incredible to Jonas never having won a World Tour time trial before this point he was gonna win this by a margin that was unimaginable at the start of the day almost a minute and 40 quicker at almost two minutes in the GC in his favor with four meaningful stages to go hats off from his teammates as jumbo vizma jumping for joy with their first win of this year's tour one that could well go a long way to sealing the general classification victory for Jonas vinegarore one minute 38 ahead of pogacha it was still second on the stage no bad performance by any means Sensational though from Still A Smile as always perhaps it's not over yet but it certainly looks very good for Jonas finger Gore yellow Jersey again and his lead now one minute 48 Yates up onto the podium Adam Yates that is as Simon Yates gets closer to the top five Carlos Rodriguez five seconds will feel that he too can still finish third Jonas finger goal though leading the Tour de France going into one of the hardest of the mountain stages did he give too much can there be a dramatic reversal it isn't over until it's over this is what's on the menu next the highest point of this year's tour 165.7 kilometers more climbing than any other stage in the tour with this Dynamic tour at the top you never know what's gonna happen it might look good for vinegar but if there's to be a change you'll be able to see it live and on demand as always on the home of cycling on gcn Plus foreign
